steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The word but sets up a contrast: Moreau accomplished much, yet her place in historical memory is unlike that of Andrade, whose status as a noteworthy first guarantees remembrance. The blank must describe a less secure or less settled legacy.

steps.title: Test the vocabulary
steps.content: A would mean Moreau's legacy is more lasting, which conflicts with the contrast. B means noticeable, and D means worthy; neither captures the uncertainty of her historical memory compared with a clearly remembered first. The word that means unclear or unsettled fits. The answer is C.
